channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US and Iran clash escalates with military strikes and Gulf infrastructure damage
item.description: The United States has launched its seventh consecutive night of military strikes against Iran, intensifying the conflict after President Donald Trump ended a temporary ceasefire. The attacks targeted ...

item.title: Tanzania commemorates Mandela Day with emphasis on unity, volunteerism, and youth empowerment
item.description: Tanzania celebrated Mandela Day on July 18, 2026, by promoting unity, volunteerism, and youth empowerment across the nation. The event, organized by local communities and government agencies, aimed to...

item.title: Exclusive tennis club highlights societal dynamics amid high fees and elite access
item.description: The article explores the social dynamics and exclusivity of a luxury tennis club with an annual membership fee of £2,000. It delves into how such clubs serve as microcosms of broader societal trends, ...

item.title: Calgary police continue search for missing 11-year-old Parker
item.description: Calgary police are continuing their search for an 11-year-old boy named Parker, who has been missing since July 16, 2026. A new image of the child was released to aid in the search, highlighting the o...

item.title: Chrislam in Nigeria: Blending Christianity and Islam for a Better Life
item.description: The article explores the phenomenon of Chrislam in Lagos, Nigeria, where a growing number of residents combine elements of Christianity and Islam to navigate urban challenges. This fusion religion, em...

item.title: Former Spain Coach Warns Against Underestimating Argentina in World Cup Final
item.description: Former Spain manager Vicente del Bosque has cautioned the national team against dismissing Argentina as a threat ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026 final, labeling them a 'real nuisance' and emphasizing...

item.title: Balochistan Government Establishes Judicial Commission to Investigate Ziarat Attack
item.description: The Balochistan government has formed a judicial commission to investigate the deadly Ziarat attack, which killed 35 people, including police personnel. This decision follows the end of a province-wid...

item.title: The Unsustainability of Nuclear Power in the Context of Climate Change
item.description: This article examines the growing challenges of nuclear power in the context of climate change, highlighting its environmental, economic, and safety risks. It discusses how nuclear energy, despite its...

item.title: Pardoned January 6 Rioter Humiliated After Failed Attempt to Crash Democratic Campaign Event
item.description: Jake Lang, a pardoned January 6 rioter and MAGA influencer, attempted to disrupt a campaign event for Democratic Senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed in Michigan. During the canvassing launch, Lang stood u...

item.title: Linda Mwananchi Faction Challenges Ruto Over Political Party Registration Block
item.description: Linda Mwananchi, a faction of ODM rebels, has accused President William Ruto of blocking efforts to register as a political party. Suba South MP Caroli Omondi, representing the group, claimed Ruto ins...

item.description: The article highlights six exceptional books that explore the complexities of football, from its historical evolution to its cultural and political significance. It begins by mentioning the conclusion...

item.title: Kimi Model's Competitive Edge and Industry Reactions
item.description: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 model has sparked significant debate in the AI community, with claims of frontier-level performance surpassing many proprietary models. The release coincided with a high-profile ...

item.title: All Blacks secure dominant victory over Ireland in Eden Park
item.description: New Zealand's All Blacks delivered a commanding performance, defeating Ireland 40-21 in a Rugby Nations Championship match at Eden Park. The hosts showcased attacking brilliance, scoring six tries to ...

item.title: Website blocks crawler bot access, urges users to check settings
item.description: The article discusses a technical issue where users are being blocked from accessing News Corp Australia's website due to automated crawler bot activity. The message explains that the site uses softwa...

item.title: Olivia Attwood showcases her glamorous outfit at a high-profile event with the help of her stylist

item.title: Rising Child Drownings: Causes and Preventive Measures
item.description: The article highlights the concerning trend of increasing drownings among young children, despite unclear causes. It emphasizes the importance of parental vigilance, water safety education, and commun...

item.title: 25-year-old woman arrested for killing husband's mistress' infant in Benue
item.description: A 25-year-old woman, Erdoo Ugede, has been arrested for allegedly killing the two-month-old son of her husband’s alleged mistress in Ankyoov, Benue State. The incident occurred after she invited the c...

item.title: Piastri's Mechanical Struggles and Ferrari's Race Highlights at Spa
item.description: Oscar Piastri's Formula 1 weekend at Spa-Francorchamps was marked by mechanical woes and Ferrari's heroic efforts to salvage the situation. The McLaren driver faced a hydraulic leak during FP1, requir...

item.title: Uganda's President Honours Late General Moses Ali for His Service and Leadership
item.description: President Yoweri Museveni has paid tribute to General Moses Ali, a veteran Ugandan politician and military leader who passed away at 87. Ali, who served as an MP for Adjumani West and held high-rankin...
